title: TiKV panic when evaluating `INT64_MAX % -1`
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ```sql CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 bigint); INSERT INTO t1 (c1) VALUES (-9223372036854775808); SELECT 1 FROM t1 where (c1 % -1) = 0; ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) no panic ### 3. bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 BIGINT NOT NULL, c2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2) VALUES (-1, NULL);
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE (c1 % -1) IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Evaluating INT64_MAX modulo negative one causes panic
